name: WABASH NATIONAL Corp
summary: Wabash National Corporation designs and manufactures semi-trailers and related transportation equipment, including dry van trailers and refrigerated trailers. The company also operates through parts distribution via Wabash Parts LLC and leasing activities through Linq Venture Holdings LLC. Wabash serves the trucking and freight transportation industry and competes in the specialized vehicle market, with exposure to both domestic and international competition including foreign manufacturers subject to anti-dumping concerns.
